productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Mary Jane Tan Casual Shoes
description: Mary Jane style shoes from catwalk. Superior in quality and high on style, this pair does not disappoint. The leather upper makes it perfect for everyday wear. Upper Leather upper with reinforced synthetic leather overlays at the heel cup and toe box Cut-out patterning no the synthetic leather overlay Cut-out patterning on the leather upper Padded insole for instep comfort Outsole TPR outsole attached to the footbed Mild grooves on the midfoot area Upraised heel with mild terraced grooves shoe Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight Use a branded leather conditioner and brush to restore shoe shine
